mapper.select: SELECT dp.id AS planId, dp.plan_date AS planDate, dp.available_minutes AS availableMinutes, CAST(COUNT(t.id) AS INTEGER) AS totalTasks, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS completedTasks FROM daily_plans dp LEFT JOIN tasks t ON t.plan_id = dp.id WHERE dp.user_id = #{userId} AND dp.status = 'completed' GROUP BY dp.id, dp.plan_date, dp.available_minutes ORDER BY dp.plan_date DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
